title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・Respect

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion wins splendidly at the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup! Following the race, Air Groove
congratulates her on her win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thunderous applause and cheers of support echo
throughout the venue. Fine Motion's spirited run
surely left a deep impression in the memories of
everyone who watched!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this incredible race behind us, Fine Motion
and I happily wonder what to do tomorrow. There
are only a few months left before she goes back
to Ireland... which means there's still time to enjoy
Japan!
